title: SoundHound AI Inc (SOUN) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth Amid Strategic Expansions
text: SoundHound AI achieved its strongest quarter to date with significant expansion across multiple business verticals. The company demonstrated robust growth metrics while navigating post-acquisition integration challenges. Key Financial Results: Revenue reached $42.7 million, representing 217% increase year over year. Non-GAAP gross margin of 58%, though GAAP margin declined to 39% due to recent acquisitions. GAAP net loss of $74.7 million versus non-GAAP loss of $11.9 million. Cash position of $230 million with zero debt. Operational Highlights: Processed nearly 3 billion queries per quarter, exceeding prior year by 100%. Expanded to over 14,000 active restaurant locations, adding 1,000 in Q2. Successfully integrated acquisitions into market-leading positions. 2025 Outlook: Management increased revenue guidance to $160-178 million annually, reflecting sustained momentum across automotive, healthcare, financial services, and restaurant sectors. The company maintains conservative projections due to the lumpy nature of enterprise deals.
